FAILURE: Income verification of 20 tenant files found 4 households (units 2B-104, 2B-207, 3B-301, 3B-305) with incomes exceeding AMI-50 threshold at recertification. Developer failed to properly recertify and adjust rents.
FAILURE: Rent roll audit found 2BR units at $620/mo and 3BR units at $810/mo, exceeding AMI-50 limits of $540 and $708 respectively. Corrective action plan demanded.
FAILURE: City of Richmond tax records show property tax delinquency of $47,832 for tax year 2025. Developer notified. 60-day cure period initiated.
